notes: Evals cover three operating modes and the mode-dispatch mechanism. For trigger-accuracy evals, run with the skill-creator optimizer. For functional evals, test with a small fixture dataset (5-10 papers with known claims).

evals.prompt: I want to continue my literature review on sex chromosome evolution. I have a review_config.yaml already set up.
evals.expected_output: Skill starts up, reads state files, and presents the mode menu (COLLECT / QC / ask / end).
expectations: Startup dashboard is printed with paper count, claim count, and QC candidate summary
Mode menu is presented with at least COLLECT and QC as options
review_config.yaml is read before any API calls are made

evals.expected_output: Skill goes directly to QC mode after startup, prints QC audit results, and asks which category to process.
expectations: QC audit results are printed with Category A/B/C counts
AskUserQuestion is used to let the user choose which category to process
No mode menu is shown before QC audit — $ARGUMENTS 'qc' dispatches directly

evals.prompt: /deepscholar what are the strongest untested ideas in my review so far?
evals.expected_output: Skill goes directly to QUERY mode, loads untested_ideas.json and relevant synthesis files, and answers the question without running the pipeline.
expectations: QUERY mode is entered without showing the mode menu
untested_ideas.json is loaded and referenced in the answer
Answer cites papers by author + year
No Scout or Reader subagents are launched

evals.prompt: Start a new literature review on the fixation probability of sex chromosome-autosome fusions across animals.
evals.expected_output: Setup wizard runs, collects research questions and scope, creates all required folders and files, generates search_terms.py with ≥50 queries.
expectations: AskUserQuestion is used for at least the first setup question
review_config.yaml is created with research_questions block
state/ and knowledge/ folders are created with empty JSON files
search_terms.py is created with at least 50 search queries
guide.md is created
leads.csv and needs_attention.csv are created with header rows

evals.prompt: Run deepscholar collect — I want 25 more papers on karyotype evolution.
evals.expected_output: Pipeline runs: Scout searches APIs, Readers extract in parallel, atomic writes to knowledge/, synthesis triggered at 25 papers, mode menu offered at checkpoint.
expectations: Scout subagent is launched using scout_prompt.md template
Reader subagents are launched in parallel (single message with multiple Agent calls)
extraction_quality_score is calculated and stored per paper
Atomic writes (write .tmp then rename) are used for JSON state files
Mode menu is offered at the 25-paper checkpoint

evals.prompt: Switch to QC mode — I want to re-extract any abstract-only papers.
evals.expected_output: QC audit runs, Category A papers are listed, fetch cascade retried, Reader re-run, new claims merged without deleting old ones.
expectations: QC audit correctly identifies abstract-only papers as Category A
Fetch cascade is re-attempted for each Category A paper before re-running Reader
New claims are appended to claims.json, not replacing existing claims
papers.json record is updated: read_depth, extraction_quality_score, last_reextraction, qc_category
Progress is reported per paper in the 🔧 QC format

evals.expected_output: QC audit identifies Category B and C candidates, user chooses which to process, re-extraction runs.
expectations: Category B threshold (extraction_quality_score < 0.65) is applied correctly
Category C stale threshold (>90 days) is read from qc_settings in review_config.yaml
AskUserQuestion is used to confirm which categories to process
Post-QC synthesis is offered if ≥10 papers were re-extracted

evals.prompt: What do we know about meiotic drive and sex chromosome evolution?
evals.expected_output: QUERY mode loads relevant synthesis narratives and claims, answers with citations, notes gaps if coverage is thin.
expectations: Only relevant synthesis/ files and claims are loaded (not all knowledge files)
Answer cites papers by first_author + year
If coverage is thin, the answer says so and suggests search queries
No pipeline steps (Scout, Reader, Synthesizer) are launched

evals.prompt: Run the pipeline but PubMed API is unavailable.
evals.expected_output: Pipeline continues using bioRxiv and OpenAlex. PubMed failure is reported once, not per-paper.
expectations: PubMed failure is logged but does not stop the pipeline
Alternative sources (bioRxiv, OpenAlex) are used for the batch
The failure is reported once in connectivity check output, not repeated

evals.prompt: Can you help me write a Python script to parse CSV files?
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger — this is a coding task, not a literature review request.
expectations: deepscholar skill is NOT loaded for this request

evals.prompt: Summarize the methods section of this paper I just pasted.
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger — this is a single-paper summarization, not a systematic review.
expectations: deepscholar skill is NOT loaded for this request
